title: Shradha Sachdev joins Dentons Link Legal as Associate Partner
description: Shradha Sachdev has joined Dentons Link Legal as an Associate Partner in Banking & Finance practice at the Firm's Delhi office.Sachdev is a 2013 graduate of Amity Law School.She has over 11 years of experience advising leading corporates, banks and financial institutions on complex equity and debt transactions. Her practice focuses on project finance, structured lending, refinancing, debt restructuring and regulatory advisory, with experience in advising banks and NBFCs on financing transact
